isolation.notes: Read-only site with hardcoded data, no shared mutable state

assertions.title: Cannabis Chef page exists and is separate

steps.observed: Page loaded with title 'Chef Kyla x Cannabis | Soul Good'

steps.expected: Page displays content about Chef Kyla's cannabis chef background
steps.observed: Page contains hero ('Chef Kyla x Cannabis'), 'A Cannabis Chef's Story' section, 'Infused Dining Experiences', 'Kyla's Taste' legacy section, and 'The Cannabis Dining Philosophy' with 4 principles (Precision Dosing, Culinary Excellence, Plant Respect, Safe & Welcoming)

steps.expected: This is a standalone page, not a section on another page
steps.observed: Page is at /cannabis-chef with its own URL, title, hero, and multiple distinct sections — confirmed separate from /about

steps.expected: Cannabis Chef link present in footer navigation
steps.observed: Footer 'Learn' column contains 'Cannabis Chef' link pointing to /cannabis-chef
Page loaded with title 'Community | Soul Good'

steps.expected: Page displays information about community involvement
steps.observed: Page contains hero ('Nourishing Our Neighborhoods'), 'Food Is a Right, Not a Privilege' section about food desert inequity, 'By the Numbers' impact stats (200+ families fed weekly, 1000+ hydroponic kits, 3 partner farms, 50+ workshops)

steps.expected: Information about events and initiatives displayed
steps.observed: 'Our Initiatives' section with 4 programs: Farms in Watts, Wellness Center in Compton, Hydroponic Plant Distribution, Food Desert Relief — each with descriptions and stats

steps.expected: Ways to get involved/connect are displayed
steps.observed: 'Ways to Get Involved' section with 4 options: Volunteer, Donate, Partner, Spread the Word. CTA section with 'Contact Us' and 'Meet Chef Kyla' links
Page loaded with title 'Testimonials | Soul Good'
12 testimonials displayed with full review text in quotes, covering meal prep, events, and catering experiences
Each review shows customer name (e.g., Jasmine R., Marcus T., Alicia M., David & Nina L., etc.)
5-star ratings displayed above each review card as terracotta-colored star icons
Filter buttons present: All Reviews, Meal Prep, Events, Catering — with '12 Reviews' count displayed

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. All three pages (cannabis-chef, community, testimonials) load correctly as separate dedicated pages with rich content, proper navigation links in the footer, and zero console errors.
